texto: This success permits us to hope that after thirty or forty years of observation on the new Planet [Neptune], we may employ it, in its turn, for the discovery of the one following it in its order of distances from the Sun. Thus, at least, we should unhappily soon fall among bodies invisible by reason of their immense distance, but whose orbits might yet be traced in a succession of ages, with the greatest exactness, by the theory of Secular Inequal
explicacao: Orientação direta de Urbain Le Verrier sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “This success permits us to hope that after thirty or forty years of observation on the new Planet…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, astronomy, discovery, útil em momentos de discovery e distance.
